slides.label: Innovation
slides.heading: ctDNA Monitoring as Response Biomarker
points: Serial ctDNA tracking predicts radiographic response 6 weeks earlier
Molecular residual disease detection sensitivity: 0.01% VAF
Early ctDNA clearance correlates with 3.4× improved PFS
Enables adaptive trial designs with real-time response assessment

slides.text: Every tumor is unique. Our job is to read its molecular signature and find the therapy it cannot resist.
Precision Oncology Initiative · Translating Genomes into Cures
